data.body: WS-C1 DONE + committed (86ce944d): WORKFLOW_RUN/WORKFLOW_STEP event types, lazy per-key LWW maps, compaction-safe, HLC+UUID convergent. 8 tests; 180 reducer/canonical/forward-compat green. Next: WS-C2 thin linear executor (graphlib.static_order, scripted+agent dispatch, named-output wiring, expression resolver) + Burr-tripwire CI test + injectable scripted-registry/agent-runner seam (WS-E/WS-D plug in).
